Card_ID: Break the neck of the donkey if the owner does not intend to redeem it
description: But every first offspring of a donkey you shall redeem with a lamb, but if you do not redeem it, then you shall break its neck; and every firstborn of man among your sons you shall redeem.

Card_ID: An uncircumcised priest must not eat food set aside for a priest

Card_ID: An uncircumcised male must not eat from the Passover lamb
description: But if a stranger sojourns with you, and celebrates the Passover to the LORD, let all his males be circumcised, and then let him come near to celebrate it; and he shall be like a native of the land. But no uncircumcised person may eat of it.

Card_ID: An impure person must not enter the Temple Mount area
description: But it shall be when evening approaches, he shall bathe himself with water, and at sundown he may reenter the camp.

Card_ID: Do not redeem the firstborn animals

Card_ID: Serve the Almighty [traditionally: with daily prayer]

description: But you shall surely kill him; your hand shall be first against him to put him to death, and afterwards the hand of all the people.

Card_ID: Do not slaughter an animal and its offspring on the same day
description: But, whether it is an ox or a sheep, you shall not kill both it and its young in one day.

Card_ID: Keep the fire burning on the altar
description: Command Aaron and his sons, saying, 'This is the law for the burnt offering: the burnt offering itself shall remain on the hearth on the altar all night until the morning, and the fire on the altar is to be kept burning on it.

Card_ID: Do not extinguish the fire on the altar
description: Command Aaron and his sons, saying, 'This is the law for the burnt offering: the burnt offering itself shall remain on the hearth on the altar all night until the morning, and the fire on the altar is to be kept burning on it.

Card_ID: Give the Levites cities to inhabit and their surrounding fields
description: Command the sons of Israel that they give to the Levites from the inheritance of their possession cities to live in; and you shall give to the Levites pasture lands around the cities.

Card_ID: Send the impure person from the Temple
description: Command the sons of Israel that they send away from the camp every leper and everyone having a discharge and everyone who is unclean because of a dead person.

Card_ID: A priest must not enter the Temple intoxicated

Card_ID: Redeem firstborn sons and give the money to a priest

Card_ID: Relatives of the litigants must not testify
description: Fathers shall not be put to death for their sons, nor shall sons be put to death for their fathers; everyone shall be put to death for his own sin.

Card_ID: The courts must carry out the laws of the plaintiff, admitter, or denier
description: For every breach of trust, whether it is for ox, for donkey, for sheep, for clothing, or for any lost thing about which one says, 'This is it,' the case of both parties shall come before the judges; he whom the judges condemn shall pay double to his neighbor.

Card_ID: Do not leave the meat of the Passover lamb of the 14th until the 16th
description: For seven days no leaven shall be seen with you in all your territory, and none of the flesh which you sacrifice on the evening of the first day shall remain overnight until morning.

Card_ID: Set aside a tithe each planting year and give it to a Levite
description: For the tithe of the sons of Israel, which they offer as an offering to the LORD, I have given to the Levites for an inheritance; therefore I have said concerning them, 'They shall have no inheritance among the sons of Israel.'

Card_ID: Press the idolater for payment of a loan
description: From a foreigner you may exact it, but your hand shall release whatever of yours is with your brother.

Card_ID: Carry out the laws of the order of inheritance
description: Further, you shall speak to the sons of Israel, saying, 'If a man dies and has no son, then you shall transfer his inheritance to his daughter.

Card_ID: Do not marry those who are not members of the Covenant
description: Furthermore, you shall not intermarry with them; you shall not give your daughters to their sons, nor shall you take their daughters for your sons.

Card_ID: The court must give lashes to the wrongdoer

Card_ID: The court must not exceed the prescribed number of lashes
description: He may beat him forty times but no more, so that he does not beat him with many more stripes than these and your brother is not degraded in your eyes.

Card_ID: Do not extradite a slave who fled to the Land of Israel
description: He shall live with you in your midst, in the place which he shall choose in one of your towns where it pleases him; you shall not mistreat him.

Card_ID: Do not wrong a slave who has come to the Land of Israel for refuge
description: He shall live with you in your midst, in the place which he shall choose in one of your towns where it pleases him; you shall not mistreat him.

Card_ID: One who profaned a sacred object must repay what he profaned plus a fifth and bring a sacrifice
description: He shall make restitution for that which he has sinned against the holy thing, and shall add to it a fifth part of it and give it to the priest. The priest shall then make atonement for him with the ram of the guilt offering, and it will be forgiven him.

Card_ID: The king must not have too many wives

Card_ID: The king must not have too much silver and gold
description: He shall not multiply wives for himself, or else his heart will turn away; nor shall he greatly increase silver and gold for himself.

Card_ID: Do not strike your father and mother

Card_ID: Know that G-d is One, a complete Unity

Card_ID: The court must judge the damages incurred by fire
description: If a fire breaks out and spreads to thorn bushes, so that stacked grain or the standing grain or the field itself is consumed, he who started the fire shall surely make restitution.

Card_ID: The courts must carry out the laws of a borrower
description: If a man borrows anything from his neighbor, and it is injured or dies while its owner is not with it, he shall make full restitution.

Card_ID: The courts must carry out the laws of a hired worker and hired guard
description: If a man gives his neighbor a donkey, an ox, a sheep, or any animal to keep for him, and it dies or is hurt or is driven away while no one is looking,

Card_ID: The courts must carry out the laws of an unpaid guard

Card_ID: The courts must hang those stoned for blasphemy or idolatry
description: If a man has committed a sin worthy of death and he is put to death, and you hang him on a tree,

Card_ID: The court must judge the damages incurred by an animal eating
description: If a man lets a field or vineyard be grazed bare and lets his animal loose so that it grazes in another man's field, he shall make restitution from the best of his own field and the best of his own vineyard.

Card_ID: Do not break oaths or vows
description: If a man makes a vow to the LORD, or takes an oath to bind himself with a binding obligation, he shall not violate his word; he shall do according to all that proceeds out of his mouth.

Card_ID: The court must judge the damages incurred by a pit

Card_ID: The court must implement punitive measures against a thief

Card_ID: The courts must carry out the death penalty of decapitation with the sword

Card_ID: Do not benefit from an ox condemned to be stoned

Card_ID: The court must judge the damages incurred by a goring ox
description: If an ox gores a man or a woman to death, the ox shall surely be stoned and its flesh shall not be eaten; but the owner of the ox shall go unpunished.

Card_ID: Lend to the poor and destitute

description: If you lend money to My people, to the poor among you, you are not to act as a creditor to him; you shall not charge him interest.

Card_ID: Do not retain a captive woman for servitude after having sexual relations with her

description: Keep far from a false charge, and do not kill the innocent or the righteous, for I will not acquit the guilty.

description: Now concerning everything which I have said to you, be on your guard; and do not mention the name of other gods, nor let them be heard from your mouth.

Card_ID: The king must have a separate book of the Law for himself
description: Now it shall come about when he sits on the throne of his kingdom, he shall write for himself a copy of this law on a scroll in the presence of the Levitical priests.

Card_ID: An leprous person must bring an offering after immersing in water

Card_ID: Each male must write a scroll of the Law

Card_ID: Give the shoulder, two cheeks, and stomach of a slaughtered animals to a priest

Card_ID: Do not eat meat torn off a living creature

Card_ID: Do not let any of the seven Canaanite nations remain alive

Card_ID: Bring all sacrifices from outside Israel to the Temple

Card_ID: Sanctify the Sabbath (in speech) from beginning to end
description: Remember the sabbath day, to keep it holy.

description: Remember what Amalek did to you along the way when you came out from Egypt,

Card_ID: Do not walk outside the city boundary on the Sabbath

Card_ID: Prepare a shovel for each soldier to dig with
description: Since the LORD your God walks in the midst of your camp to deliver you and to defeat your enemies before you, therefore your camp must be holy; and He must not see anything indecent among you or He will turn away from you.

Card_ID: Rest on the seventh day Sabbath
description: Six days you are to do your work, but on the seventh day you shall cease from labor so that your ox and your donkey may rest, and the son of your female slave, as well as your stranger, may refresh themselves.

Card_ID: Cover the blood of a slaughtered beast or fowl with earth
description: So when any man from the sons of Israel, or from the aliens who sojourn among them, in hunting catches a beast or a bird which may be eaten, he shall pour out its blood and cover it with earth.

Card_ID: Do not leave the Temple unguarded
description: So you shall attend to the obligations of the sanctuary and the obligations of the altar, so that there will no longer be wrath on the sons of Israel.

Card_ID: Carry out the procedure of the sin offering
description: Speak to Aaron and to his sons, saying, 'This is the law of the sin offering: in the place where the burnt offering is slain the sin offering shall be slain before the LORD; it is most holy.

Card_ID: The priests must bless the Israelite nation daily
description: Speak to Aaron and to his sons, saying, 'Thus you shall bless the sons of Israel. You shall say to them:

Card_ID: A priest with a physical blemish must not serve
description: Speak to Aaron, saying, 'No man of your offspring throughout their generations who has a defect shall approach to offer the food of his God.

Card_ID: A priest with a temporary blemish must not serve
description: Speak to Aaron, saying, 'No man of your offspring throughout their generations who has a defect shall approach to offer the food of his God.

Card_ID: Estimate the value of people as determined by the Law
description: Speak to the sons of Israel and say to them, 'When a man makes a difficult vow, he shall be valued according to your valuation of persons belonging to the LORD.

Card_ID: Offer the wave offering from the meal of the new wheat
description: Speak to the sons of Israel and say to them, 'When you enter the land which I am going to give to you and reap its harvest, then you shall bring in the sheaf of the first fruits of your harvest to the priest.

Speak to the sons of Israel, and tell them that they shall make for themselves tassels on the corners of their garments throughout their generations, and that they shall put on the tassel of each corner a cord of blue.

Card_ID: Rest on the Feast of Trumpets
description: Speak to the sons of Israel, saying, 'In the seventh month on the first of the month you shall have a rest, a reminder by blowing of trumpets, a holy convocation.

Card_ID: Examine the signs of animals to distinguish between those which are kosher and non-kosher
description: Speak to the sons of Israel, saying, 'These are the creatures which you may eat from all the animals that are on the earth.

Card_ID: Observe the laws of impurity caused by childbirth
description: Speak to the sons of Israel, saying: 'When a woman gives birth and bears a male child, then she shall be unclean for seven days, as in the days of her menstruation she shall be unclean.

Card_ID: Impure priests must not do service in the Temple
description: Tell Aaron and his sons to be careful with the holy gifts of the sons of Israel, which they dedicate to Me, so as not to profane My holy name; I am the LORD.

Card_ID: Do not derive benefit from ornaments of idols
description: The graven images of their gods you are to burn with fire; you shall not covet the silver or the gold that is on them, nor take it for yourselves, or you will be snared by it, for it is an abomination to the LORD your God.

Card_ID: Do not reproduce the incense formula
description: The incense which you shall make, you shall not make in the same proportions for yourselves; it shall be holy to you for the LORD.

Card_ID: The Tribe of Levi must not be given a portion of the land in Israel
description: The Levitical priests, the whole tribe of Levi, shall have no portion or inheritance with Israel; they shall eat the LORD'S offerings by fire and His portion.

Card_ID: The Levites must not take a share in the spoils of war
description: The Levitical priests, the whole tribe of Levi, shall have no portion or inheritance with Israel; they shall eat the LORD'S offerings by fire and His portion.
The LORD will establish you as a holy people to Himself, as He swore to you, if you keep the commandments of the LORD your God and walk in His ways.

Card_ID: Listen to the prophet speaking in G-d's Name
description: The LORD your God will raise up for you a prophet like me from among you, from your countrymen, you shall listen to him.
the other Elam" whose sons (descendants) returned to Judah after captivity (EZR 2:31)

Card_ID: Do not remove the staves from the ark
description: The poles shall remain in the rings of the ark; they shall not be removed from it.

Card_ID: Bring an offering when guilt is determined for certain sins
description: Then he shall bring to the priest his guilt offering to the LORD, a ram without defect from the flock, according to your valuation, for a guilt offering,

Card_ID: Do not tear the priestly garments
description: There shall be an opening at its top in the middle of it; around its opening there shall be a binding of woven work, like the opening of a coat of mail, so that it will not be torn.

Card_ID: Do not perform acts of magic
description: There shall not be found among you anyone who makes his son or his daughter pass through the fire, one who uses divination, one who practices witchcraft, or one who interprets omens, or a sorcerer,

Card_ID: Do not go into a trance to foresee events, etc
description: There shall not be found among you anyone who makes his son or his daughter pass through the fire, one who uses divination, one who practices witchcraft, or one who interprets omens, or a sorcerer,

Card_ID: Wipe out the descendants of Amalek
description: Therefore it shall come about when the LORD your God has given you rest from all your surrounding enemies, in the land which the LORD your God gives you as an inheritance to possess, you shall blot out the memory of Amalek from under heaven; you must not forget.

Card_ID: Do not forget Amalek's atrocities and ambush on our journey from Egypt in the desert
description: Therefore it shall come about when the LORD your God has given you rest from all your surrounding enemies, in the land which the LORD your God gives you as an inheritance to possess, you shall blot out the memory of Amalek from under heaven; you must not forget.

Card_ID: One who is not a priest must not serve
description: They shall be joined with you and attend to the obligations of the tent of meeting, for all the service of the tent; but an outsider may not come near you.

Card_ID: Do not loosen the breastplate from the ephod
description: They shall bind the breastpiece by its rings to the rings of the ephod with a blue cord, so that it will be on the skillfully woven band of the ephod, and that the breastpiece will not come loose from the ephod.

Card_ID: Do not let idolaters dwell in the Land of Israel
description: They shall not live in your land, because they will make you sin against Me; for if you serve their gods, it will surely be a snare to you.

Card_ID: Release all loans during the seventh year
description: This is the manner of remission: every creditor shall release what he has loaned to his neighbor; he shall not exact it of his neighbor and his brother, because the LORD'S remission has been proclaimed.

Card_ID: Do not pressure or claim from the borrower during the seventh year
description: This is the manner of remission: every creditor shall release what he has loaned to his neighbor; he shall not exact it of his neighbor and his brother, because the LORD'S remission has been proclaimed.

Card_ID: The high priest must bring a meal offering every day
description: This is the offering which Aaron and his sons are to present to the LORD on the day when he is anointed; the tenth of an ephah of fine flour as a regular grain offering, half of it in the morning and half of it in the evening.

Card_ID: Carry out the procedure of the Red Heifer
description: This is the statute of the law which the LORD has commanded, saying, 'Speak to the sons of Israel that they bring you an unblemished red heifer in which is no defect and on which a yoke has never been placed.

Card_ID: Each male Israelite must give a half shekel annually
description: This is what everyone who is numbered shall give: half a shekel according to the shekel of the sanctuary (the shekel is twenty gerahs), half a shekel as a contribution to the LORD.

Card_ID: The month of Passover (Nisan) shall be the first month
description: This month shall be the beginning of months for you; it is to be the first month of the year to you.

Card_ID: Afflict yourself on the Day of Atonement
description: This shall be a permanent statute for you: in the seventh month, on the tenth day of the month, you shall humble your souls and not do any work, whether the native, or the alien who sojourns among you;

Card_ID: Carry out the prescribed rules for purifying the leprous person
description: This shall be the law of the leper in the day of his cleansing. Now he shall be brought to the priest,

Card_ID: Celebrate on Passover, the Feast of Weeks, and the Feast of Tabernacles and bring a peace offering
description: Three times a year you shall celebrate a feast to Me.

Card_ID: Go to the Temple on Passover, the Feast of Weeks, and the Feast of Tabernacles
description: Three times in a year all your males shall appear before the LORD your God in the place which He chooses, at the Feast of Unleavened Bread and at the Feast of Weeks and at the Feast of Booths, and they shall not appear before the LORD empty-handed.

Card_ID: Do not appear at the Temple during Passover, the Feast of Weeks, and the Feast of Tabernacles without offerings
description: Three times in a year all your males shall appear before the LORD your God in the place which He chooses, at the Feast of Unleavened Bread and at the Feast of Weeks and at the Feast of Booths, and they shall not appear before the LORD empty-handed.

Card_ID: The priests must eat the sacrificial meat in the Temple
description: Thus they shall eat those things by which atonement was made at their ordination and consecration; but a layman shall not eat them, because they are holy.

Card_ID: A non- priest must not eat certain sacrificial meat
description: Thus they shall eat those things by which atonement was made at their ordination and consecration; but a layman shall not eat them, because they are holy.

Card_ID: Do not ignore a lost object
description: Thus you shall do with his donkey, and you shall do the same with his garment, and you shall do likewise with anything lost by your countryman, which he has lost and you have found. You are not allowed to neglect them.

Card_ID: Do not see leaven in your domain seven days during Passover
description: Unleavened bread shall be eaten throughout the seven days; and nothing leavened shall be seen among you, nor shall any leaven be seen among you in all your borders.

Card_ID: Do not add any commandments to the Law
description: Whatever I command you, you shall be careful to do; you shall not add to nor take away from it.

Card_ID: Do not diminish any commandments from the Law
description: Whatever I command you, you shall be careful to do; you shall not add to nor take away from it.

Card_ID: Carry out the laws of leprous clothing
description: When a garment has a mark of leprosy in it, whether it is a wool garment or a linen garment,

Card_ID: He who has taken a wife, built a new home, or planted a vineyard is given a year to rejoice with his possessions
description: When a man takes a new wife, he shall not go out with the army nor be charged with any duty; he shall be free at home one year and shall give happiness to his wife whom he has taken.

Card_ID: Do not demand any communal or military involvement for one year
description: When a man takes a new wife, he shall not go out with the army nor be charged with any duty; he shall be free at home one year and shall give happiness to his wife whom he has taken.

Card_ID: Issue a divorce by means of a "get" document
description: When a man takes a wife and marries her, and it happens that she finds no favor in his eyes because he has found some indecency in her, and he writes her a certificate of divorce and puts it in her hand and sends her out from his house,

Card_ID: Do not be afraid of killing the false prophet
description: When a prophet speaks in the name of the LORD, if the thing does not come about or come true, that is the thing which the LORD has not spoken. The prophet has spoken it presumptuously; you shall not be afraid of him.

Card_ID: Offer only animals which are at least eight days old
description: When an ox or a sheep or a goat is born, it shall remain seven days with its mother, and from the eighth day on it shall be accepted as a sacrifice of an offering by fire to the LORD.

Card_ID: A man must marry the widow of his childless brother
description: When brothers live together and one of them dies and has no son, the wife of the deceased shall not be married outside the family to a strange man. Her husband's brother shall go in to her and take her to himself as wife and perform the duty of a husband's brother to her.

Card_ID: A childless widow must not remarry until the ties with her brother-in-law are removed
description: When brothers live together and one of them dies and has no son, the wife of the deceased shall not be married outside the family to a strange man. Her husband's brother shall go in to her and take her to himself as wife and perform the duty of a husband's brother to her.

Card_ID: Return the collateral to the debtor when needed
description: When the sun goes down you shall surely return the pledge to him, that he may sleep in his cloak and bless you; and it will be righteousness for you before the LORD your God.

Card_ID: Offer peace terms to the inhabitants of a city while holding siege, and treat them according to the Law if they accept the terms
description: When you approach a city to fight against it, you shall offer it terms of peace.

Card_ID: Appoint a priest to speak with the soldiers during the war
description: When you are approaching the battle, the priest shall come near and speak to the people.

Card_ID: Do not destroy fruit trees even during the siege
description: When you besiege a city a long time, to make war against it in order to capture it, you shall not destroy its trees by swinging an axe against them; for you may eat from them, and you shall not cut them down. For is the tree of the field a man, that it should be besieged by you?

Card_ID: Do not allow pitfalls and obstacles to remain on your property
description: When you build a new house, you shall make a parapet for your roof, so that you will not bring bloodguilt on your house if anyone falls from it.

Card_ID: Make a guard rail around flat roofs
description: When you build a new house, you shall make a parapet for your roof, so that you will not bring bloodguilt on your house if anyone falls from it.

Card_ID: Carry out the laws of leprous houses
description: When you enter the land of Canaan, which I give you for a possession, and I put a mark of leprosy on a house in the land of your possession,

Card_ID: The hired worker may eat from the unharvested crops where he works
description: When you enter your neighbor's standing grain, then you may pluck the heads with your hand, but you shall not wield a sickle in your neighbor's standing grain.

Card_ID: The worker must not eat while on hired time
description: When you enter your neighbor's standing grain, then you may pluck the heads with your hand, but you shall not wield a sickle in your neighbor's standing grain.

Card_ID: The worker must not take more than he can eat
description: When you enter your neighbor's standing grain, then you may pluck the heads with your hand, but you shall not wield a sickle in your neighbor's standing grain.

Card_ID: Sound the ram's horn when going to war
description: When you go to war in your land against the adversary who attacks you, then you shall sound an alarm with the trumpets, that you may be remembered before the LORD your God, and be saved from your enemies.
When you have eaten and are satisfied, you shall bless the LORD your God for the good land which He has given you.

Card_ID: The creditor must not forcibly take collateral
description: When you make your neighbor a loan of any sort, you shall not enter his house to take his pledge.

Card_ID: Leave the forgotten sheaves in the field for the poor
description: When you reap your harvest in your field and have forgotten a sheaf in the field, you shall not go back to get it; it shall be for the alien, for the orphan, and for the widow, in order that the LORD your God may bless you in all the work of your hands.

Card_ID: Do not retrieve sheaves forgotten in the field but leave them for the poor
description: When you reap your harvest in your field and have forgotten a sheaf in the field, you shall not go back to get it; it shall be for the alien, for the orphan, and for the widow, in order that the LORD your God may bless you in all the work of your hands.

Card_ID: Do not send a Hebrew slave away empty-handed
description: When you set him free, you shall not send him away empty-handed.

Card_ID: Do not eat second tithe grains outside Jerusalem
description: You are not allowed to eat within your gates the tithe of your grain or new wine or oil, or the firstborn of your herd or flock, or any of your votive offerings which you vow, or your freewill offerings, or the contribution of your hand.

Card_ID: Do not eat second tithe wine products outside Jerusalem
description: You are not allowed to eat within your gates the tithe of your grain or new wine or oil, or the firstborn of your herd or flock, or any of your votive offerings which you vow, or your freewill offerings, or the contribution of your hand.

Card_ID: Do not eat second tithe oil outside Jerusalem
description: You are not allowed to eat within your gates the tithe of your grain or new wine or oil, or the firstborn of your herd or flock, or any of your votive offerings which you vow, or your freewill offerings, or the contribution of your hand.

Card_ID: The priests must not eat the first fruits outside Jerusalem
description: You are not allowed to eat within your gates the tithe of your grain or new wine or oil, or the firstborn of your herd or flock, or any of your votive offerings which you vow, or your freewill offerings, or the contribution of your hand.

Card_ID: Do not eat the meat of an offering away from the Temple
description: You are not allowed to eat within your gates the tithe of your grain or new wine or oil, or the firstborn of your herd or flock, or any of your votive offerings which you vow, or your freewill offerings, or the contribution of your hand.

Card_ID: The priests must not eat the meat outside the Temple courtyard
description: You are not allowed to eat within your gates the tithe of your grain or new wine or oil, or the firstborn of your herd or flock, or any of your votive offerings which you vow, or your freewill offerings, or the contribution of your hand.

Card_ID: The priests must not eat unblemished firstborn animals outside Jerusalem
description: You are not allowed to eat within your gates the tithe of your grain or new wine or oil, or the firstborn of your herd or flock, or any of your votive offerings which you vow, or your freewill offerings, or the contribution of your hand.

Card_ID: Do not tear or cut the skin in mourning
description: You are the sons of the LORD your God; you shall not cut yourselves nor shave your forehead for the sake of the dead.

Card_ID: Do not make a bald spot in mourning
description: You are the sons of the LORD your God; you shall not cut yourselves nor shave your forehead for the sake of the dead.

Card_ID: Lend to and borrow from idolaters with interest
description: You may charge interest to a foreigner, but to your countrymen you shall not charge interest, so that the Lord your God may bless you in all that you undertake in the land which you are about to enter to possess.

Card_ID: Examine the signs of fowl to distinguish between those which are kosher and non-kosher
description: You may eat any clean bird.

Card_ID: Read the portion of Scripture pertaining to the presentation of first fruits
description: You shall answer and say before the LORD your God, 'My father was a wandering Aramean, and he went down to Egypt and sojourned there, few in number; but there he became a great, mighty and populous nation.
You shall appoint for yourself judges and officers in all your towns which the LORD your God is giving you, according to your tribes, and they shall judge the people with righteous judgment.

Card_ID: Fulfill what you uttered and do what you vowed
description: You shall be careful to perform what goes out from your lips, just as you have voluntarily vowed to the LORD your God, what you have promised.

Card_ID: Do not eat meat of an animal that was mortally wounded
description: You shall be holy men to Me, therefore you shall not eat any flesh torn to pieces in the field; you shall throw it to the dogs.
You shall bind them as a sign on your hand and they shall be as frontals on your forehead.
You shall bind them as a sign on your hand and they shall be as frontals on your forehead.

Card_ID: Do not eat meat and milk cooked together
description: You shall bring the choice first fruits of your soil into the house of the LORD your God. "You are not to boil a young goat in the milk of its mother.

Card_ID: Set aside the first fruits and bring them to the Temple
description: You shall bring the choice first fruits of your soil into the house of the LORD your God."You are not to boil a young goat in the milk of its mother.

Card_ID: Do not cook meat and milk together
description: You shall bring the very first of the first fruits of your soil into the house of the LORD your God. "You shall not boil a young goat in its mother's milk.

You shall consecrate to the LORD your God all the firstborn males that are born of your herd and of your flock; you shall not work with the firstborn of your herd, nor shear the firstborn of your flock.

Card_ID: Do not shear the fleece of consecrated animals
description: You shall consecrate to the LORD your God all the firstborn males that are born of your herd and of your flock; you shall not work with the firstborn of your herd, nor shear the firstborn of your flock.

Card_ID: Swear in G-d's Name to confirm the truth when deemed necessary by court
description: You shall fear the LORD your God; you shall serve Him and cling to Him, and you shall swear by His name.
You shall fear the LORD your God; you shall serve Him and cling to Him, and you shall swear by His name.

Card_ID: Cleave to those who know G-d (and His Law)
description: You shall fear the LORD your God; you shall serve Him and cling to Him, and you shall swear by His name.

Card_ID: Do not listen to a false prophet
description: You shall follow the LORD your God and fear Him; and you shall keep His commandments, listen to His voice, serve Him, and cling to Him.

Card_ID: Give a Hebrew slave gifts when he goes free
description: You shall furnish him liberally from your flock and from your threshing floor and from your wine vat; you shall give to him as the LORD your God has blessed you.

Card_ID: Pay wages on the day they were earned
description: You shall give him his wages on his day before the sun sets, for he is poor and sets his heart on it; so that he will not cry against you to the LORD and it become sin in you.

Card_ID: Set aside a gift of food for the priest
description: You shall give him the first fruits of your grain, your new wine, and your oil, and the first shearing of your sheep.

Card_ID: Give the first shearing of sheep to a priest
description: You shall give him the first fruits of your grain, your new wine, and your oil, and the first shearing of your sheep.

Card_ID: Do not entertain thoughts of other gods besides G-d
description: You shall have no other gods before Me.
You shall love the LORD your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your might.

Card_ID: The priests must wear their priestly garments during service
description: You shall make holy garments for Aaron your brother, for glory and for beauty.

Card_ID: Do not destroy objects associated with G-d's Name
description: You shall not act like this toward the LORD your God.

Card_ID: The court must not let the sorcerer live
description: You shall not allow a sorceress to live.

Card_ID: Judges must not accept testimony unless both parties are present
description: You shall not bear a false report; do not join your hand with a wicked man to be a malicious witness.
You shall not bear a false report; do not join your hand with a wicked man to be a malicious witness.
You shall not bear false witness against your neighbor.

Card_ID: Do not derive benefit from idols and their accessories
description: You shall not bring an abomination into your house, and like it come under the ban; you shall utterly detest it and you shall utterly abhor it, for it is something banned.

Card_ID: Do not offer animals bought with the wages of a harlot or the wages of a dog
description: You shall not bring the hire of a harlot or the wages of a dog into the house of the LORD your God for any votive offering, for both of these are an abomination to the LORD your God.

Card_ID: Do not have sexual relations with women not married by means of a marriage agreement and sanctification
description: You shall not bring the hire of a harlot or the wages of a dog into the house of the LORD your God for any votive offering, for both of these are an abomination to the LORD your God.

Card_ID: Do not covet and scheme to acquire another's possession
description: You shall not covet your neighbor's house; you shall not covet your neighbor's wife or his male servant or his female servant or his ox or his donkey or anything that belongs to your neighbor.
You shall not curse God, nor curse a ruler of your people.
You shall not curse God, nor curse a ruler of your people.

Card_ID: Do not curse the head of state or leader of the Sanhedrin
description: You shall not curse God, nor curse a ruler of your people.

Card_ID: Do not preface one tithe to the next, but separate them in their proper order
description: You shall not delay the offering from your harvest and your vintage. The firstborn of your sons you shall give to Me.

Card_ID: Do not prevent a third-generation Egyptian convert from marrying into the Covenant people
description: You shall not detest an Edomite, for he is your brother; you shall not detest an Egyptian, because you were an alien in his land.

Card_ID: Do not refrain from marrying a third generation Edomite convert
description: You shall not detest an Edomite, for he is your brother; you shall not detest an Egyptian, because you were an alien in his land.

Card_ID: Do not offer peace to Ammon and Moab while besieging them
description: You shall not detest an Edomite, for he is your brother; you shall not detest an Egyptian, because you were an alien in his land.

Card_ID: Do not eat sacrifices which have become unfit or blemished
description: You shall not eat any detestable thing.

Card_ID: Do not eat of an animal that dies of natural causes
description: You shall not eat anything which dies of itself. You may give it to the alien who is in your town, so that he may eat it, or you may sell it to a foreigner, for you are a holy people to the LORD your God. You shall not boil a young goat in its mother's milk.

Card_ID: Do not eat leavened food on the afternoon of the 14th day of Nisan
description: You shall not eat leavened bread with it; seven days you shall eat with it unleavened bread, the bread of affliction (for you came out of the land of Egypt in haste), so that you may remember all the days of your life the day when you came out of the land of Egypt.

Card_ID: A priest must not leave the Temple during service
description: You shall not even go out from the doorway of the tent of meeting, or you will die; for the LORD'S anointing oil is upon you." So they did according to the word of Moses.

Card_ID: Decide by majority in case of disagreement
description: You shall not follow the masses in doing evil, nor shall you testify in a dispute so as to turn aside after a multitude in order to pervert justice;

Card_ID: The court must not execute through a majority of one; at least a majority of two is required
description: You shall not follow the masses in doing evil, nor shall you testify in a dispute so as to turn aside after a multitude in order to pervert justice;

Card_ID: A judge who presented an acquittal plea must not present an argument for conviction in capital cases
description: You shall not follow the masses in doing evil, nor shall you testify in a dispute so as to turn aside after a multitude in order to pervert justice;

Card_ID: Do not possess inaccurate scales and weights even if they are not for use
description: You shall not have in your bag differing weights, a large and a small.

Card_ID: The court must not inflict punishment on the Sabbath
description: You shall not kindle a fire in any of your dwellings on the sabbath day.

Card_ID: Do not make an idol for yourself
description: You shall not make for yourself an idol, or any likeness of what is in heaven above or on the earth beneath or in the water under the earth.

Card_ID: Do not move a boundary marker to steal someone's property
description: You shall not move your neighbor's boundary mark, which the ancestors have set, in your inheritance which you will inherit in the land that the LORD your God gives you to possess.

Card_ID: Do not muzzle an ox while plowing
description: You shall not muzzle the ox while he is threshing.

Card_ID: Do not burn anything on the Golden Altar besides incense
description: You shall not offer any strange incense on this altar, or burnt offering or meal offering; and you shall not pour out a drink offering on it.

Card_ID: Do not slaughter the paschal sacrifice while in possession of leaven
description: You shall not offer the blood of My sacrifice with leavened bread; nor is the fat of My feast to remain overnight until morning.

Card_ID: Do not leave the fat of the paschal sacrifice overnight
description: You shall not offer the blood of My sacrifice with leavened bread; nor is the fat of My feast to remain overnight until morning.

Card_ID: Do not demand collateral from a widow
description: You shall not pervert the justice due an alien or an orphan, nor take a widow's garment in pledge.

Card_ID: A judge must not pervert a case involving a foreigner or orphan
description: You shall not pervert the justice due an alien or an orphan, nor take a widow's garment in pledge.

Card_ID: A judge must not decide unjustly the case of the habitual transgressor
description: You shall not pervert the justice due to your needy brother in his dispute.

Card_ID: A judge must not pity the murderer or assaulter at the trial
description: You shall not pity him, but you shall purge the blood of the innocent from Israel, that it may go well with you.

Card_ID: Do not plant a tree in the Temple courtyard
description: You shall not plant for yourself an Asherah of any kind of tree beside the altar of the LORD your God, which you shall make for yourself.

Card_ID: Do not work different animals together
description: You shall not plow with an ox and a donkey together.
You shall not profane My holy name, but I will be sanctified among the sons of Israel; I am the LORD who sanctifies you,
You shall not profane My holy name, but I will be sanctified among the sons of Israel; I am the LORD who sanctifies you,
You shall not put the LORD your God to the test, as you tested Him at Massah.

Card_ID: Do not offer a temporarily blemished animal
description: You shall not sacrifice to the LORD your God an ox or a sheep which has a blemish or any defect, for that is a detestable thing to the LORD your God.
You shall not see your countryman's donkey or his ox fallen down on the way, and pay no attention to them; you shall certainly help him to raise them up.

Card_ID: Do not leave others distraught with their burdens (but to help either load or unload)
description: You shall not see your countryman's donkey or his ox fallen down on the way, and pay no attention to them; you shall certainly help him to raise them up.
You shall not see your countryman's ox or his sheep straying away, and pay no attention to them; you shall certainly bring them back to your countryman.

Card_ID: Do not erect a pillar in a public place of worship
description: You shall not set up for yourself a sacred pillar which the LORD your God hates.

Card_ID: Do not eat diverse seeds planted in a vineyard
description: You shall not sow your vineyard with two kinds of seed, or all the produce of the seed which you have sown and the increase of the vineyard will become defiled.

Card_ID: Do not plant grains or greens in a vineyard
description: You shall not sow your vineyard with two kinds of seed, or all the produce of the seed which you have sown and the increase of the vineyard will become defiled.
You shall not take a bribe, for a bribe blinds the clear-sighted and subverts the cause of the just.

Card_ID: Do not take G-d's Name in vain
description: You shall not take the name of the LORD your God in vain, for the LORD will not leave him unpunished who takes His name in vain.

Card_ID: Do not wear cloth woven of wool and linen

So Pharaoh said to Joseph, "Since God has informed you of all this, there is no one so discerning and wise as you are. You shall be over my house, and according to your command all my people shall do homage; only in the throne I will be greater than you." Pharaoh said to Joseph, "See, I have set you over all the land of Egypt." Then Pharaoh took off his signet ring from his hand and put it on Joseph's hand, and clothed him in garments of fine linen and put the gold necklace around his neck. He had him ride in his second chariot; and they proclaimed before him, "Bow the knee!" And he set him over all the land of Egypt. Moreover, Pharaoh said to Joseph, "Though I am Pharaoh, yet without your permission no one shall raise his hand or foot in all the land of Egypt." Then Pharaoh named Joseph Zaphenath-paneah; and he gave him Asenath, the daughter of Potiphera priest of On, as his wife. And Joseph went forth over the land of Egypt. Now Joseph was THIRTY YEARS OLD when he stood before Pharaoh, king of Egypt. And Joseph went out from the presence of Pharaoh and went through all the land of Egypt. (GEN 41:39-46)
